title: Purge reseed-resurrected historical agents from the SQLite agents table
description: The revived LangGraph runner (venv rebuilt during TASK-095) shows ~10 dead historical sessions as available in map.db agents: claude-lab-fema/fifi/kiri/miro, codex-lab-kana/lepa/memo/milo/nora/zune, plus limit-watcher as an agent. These are reseed fallout from the 2026-07-02 map.db rebuild: the mirror churn was cleaned (TASK-086 era) but the underlying SQLite rows kept status=available, un-doing the TASK-082 16->6 reconcile at the source. Also: TASK-096 shows READY in SQLite while it was retired as duplicate-BLOCKED in the graph mirror -- same two-readers-one-truth pattern (SYN-0001). Fix at the SQLite source per TASK-082 semantics (inactive/session_ended for historical sessions, tool_identity for limit-watcher), export, verify reconcile_agents.py and the runner agree, and align TASK-096 status across db/mirrors.
acceptance_criteria: Runner and status.json show only genuinely available agents; historical sessions inactive with reasons per agents/README.md semantics
TASK-096 status consistent across SQLite, task JSON, and graph
